name: Vendor Risk Analyzer — External (Cloud LLM)
description: Advisory agent for third-party vendor risk assessment during TPRM onboarding. External deployment path: analyzes vendor-disclosed documents (security questionnaire, SOC 2 Type II, ISO 27001 cert, DPA, subprocessor list, optional pentest/BCP/insurance) using Anthropic claude-sonnet-4-6 for synthesis reasoning. Operator queries containing internal system references or MNPI scope are automatically routed to the internal-only sibling system (sys-vendor-risk-int-001) by the policy_gate decorator. PII tokenization occurs BEFORE any external prompt egress per the canonical scrubber-before-tracer rule.
use_case: Reduce mean cycle time from vendor-package-received to structured risk assessment from 5 business days to 4 hours, with consistent rubric application across reviewers.
